mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_id, user_id, goods_id, status, pay_deadline, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{status}, #{payDeadline}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, goods_id, status, pay_deadline, pay_time, close_time, out_pay_no, create_time, update_time FROM t_order WHERE status = 'UN_PAY' AND pay_deadline < NOW() LIMIT 1000
